title: $10,000 in Realty Income (REIT) with DRIP (2010)
description: What $10,000 invested in Realty Income Corporation on January 4, 2010 would be worth today with all dividends reinvested. Realty Income is famous for paying monthly dividends and is known as 'The Monthly Dividend Company.' It is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns over 13,000 properties.
dividend_note: Realty Income pays monthly dividends and has raised its dividend 124+ consecutive times (as of 2024). Monthly DRIP compounds faster than quarterly due to more frequent reinvestment.
reit_note: As a REIT, Realty Income is required by law to distribute at least 90% of its taxable income as dividends. REIT dividends are generally taxed as ordinary income, not at the lower qualified dividend rate.
educational_note: DRIP contributed approximately 45% of total return — by far the highest DRIP contribution of any scenario in this dataset. Monthly compounding of a high-yield dividend accelerates returns significantly. The trade-off: lower price appreciation than growth stocks.
